channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Distinguished Second World War veteran Frank Chester dies aged 109
item.description: Frank Chester, a highly decorated Second World War veteran, has passed away at the age of 109 in a nursing home in Malvern, Worcestershire. Born in Ludlow, Shropshire, in April 1917, Chester served in...

item.title: Fortescue pushes for diesel tax credit reforms amid rising fuel costs
item.description: Fortescue Metals Group, under the leadership of billionaire Andrew Forrest, has announced a national TV and radio campaign targeting the current diesel tax credit system in Australia. The company, whi...

item.title: Millicent Omanga’s Weight Loss Journey Draws Mixed Reactions from Kenyans
item.description: Kenyan politician Millicent Omanga has stirred online conversations after photos showing her significant weight loss went viral. The images, shared around April 19, clearly contrast her past and curre...

item.title: Amazon to invest in Anthropic to boost AI capacity with $25 billion deal
item.description: On April 20, 2026, Amazon announced its plan to invest up to $25 billion in Anthropic, an AI startup known for developing the Claude model. This investment is part of a larger deal where Anthropic wil...

item.title: Carney government to launch advisory council ahead of upcoming USMCA review
item.description: Prime Minister Mark Carney’s government is preparing to establish a new Canada–United States advisory council to help guide the country through an expectedly difficult review of the United States-Mexi...

item.title: Court Rules Private School Fairly Sacked Dean Over Falsified Fire Drill Records
item.description: A former dean of students at Nova Kenya, one of the top private schools in Nairobi, lost her case at the Employment and Labour Relations Court after she was fired for messing up fire drill records. Th...

item.title: Karachi Doctor Killed in Targeted Shooting on Sharea Faisal
item.description: In a tragic incident late last night, Dr Sarang Memon, a doctor serving at a private hospital in Gulistan-e-Jauhar, was shot dead on Sharea Faisal in Karachi. According to police, Dr Memon was travell...

item.title: Ed Miliband expressed concerns over Mandelson appointment as Starmer faces scrutiny
item.description: Ed Miliband has disclosed that he raised concerns about Peter Mandelson's appointment as US ambassador prior to the decision, warning that it could 'blow up'. Miliband spoke with David Lammy about his...

item.title: Late goal by Kapanen gives Oilers comeback win over Ducks in Game 1
item.description: The Edmonton Oilers opened their first-round NHL playoff series with a 4-3 comeback victory over the Anaheim Ducks, thanks to a late third-period goal from Kasperi Kapanen. Kapanen scored twice in the...

item.title: South Africa honours trailblazer Cynthia Shange after her passing at 76
item.description: President Cyril Ramaphosa has led tributes following the death of Cynthia Shange, a celebrated South African actress and former beauty queen, who passed away at the age of 76 after a period of illness...

item.title: Mel Senen Sarmiento appointed Presidential Adviser for Peace, Reconciliation, and Unity
item.description: Former Interior and Local Government Secretary Mel Senen Sarmiento has been appointed as the Presidential Adviser for Peace, Reconciliation, and Unity (PAPRU). Sarmiento brings extensive experience in...

item.title: Australia’s Food Security Faces Increasing Risks from Climate and Supply Challenges
item.description: Australia, long regarded as a global food bowl, is confronting rising risks to its food security. Despite producing enough to feed 75 million people and exporting 70% of its produce, the nation faces ...

item.title: DA Requests Parliamentary Inquiry into Minister Tolashe Over Multiple Allegations
item.description: The Democratic Alliance (DA) has formally called for an inquiry into Minister of Social Development, Sisisi Tolashe, over a series of serious allegations. These include the alleged unlawful appointmen...

item.title: Marcos appoints Mel Sarmiento as new peace adviser, replacing Carlito Galvez Jr.
item.description: Pinalitan ni Pangulong Ferdinand Marcos Jr. si Carlito Galvez Jr. bilang presidential adviser on peace, reconciliation and unity, kung saan itinalaga ang dating interior secretary na si Mel Senen Sarm...

item.title: Man takes on Ironman triathlon challenge in memory of late wife, raising funds for brain tumour research
item.description: Alan Johnstone, from Dumfries, is preparing for an Ironman triathlon in June 2027 to honour his late wife, Anneka, who passed away from a glioblastoma brain tumour in 2019. Despite having no prior swi...

item.title: DOJ says evidence suggests Zaldy Co is under custody in Czech Republic despite lack of documents
item.description: Sinabi ng Department of Justice (DOJ) na bagamat wala pang opisyal na dokumento o larawan na nagpapatunay sa pag-aresto kay dating kongresista Zaldy Co, may mga indikasyon na nagpapakita na siya ay na...

item.title: Jandor Clarifies No APC Candidate Yet for 2027 Lagos Governorship Race
item.description: Abdulazeez Adediran, wey people sabi as Jandor and former PDP governorship candidate for Lagos State, don talk say Deputy Governor Obafemi Hamzat never openly declare say he wan contest for the 2027 g...

item.title: Analysis of Trump’s messaging and strategy as Iran ceasefire deadline approaches
item.description: This Guardian Australia podcast episode examines Donald Trump’s behaviour and messaging as a ceasefire deadline involving Iran approaches, focusing on the uncertainty surrounding his strategic intent....

item.title: Labatt’s Commitment to Sustainability: A Collaborative Effort Across its Operations
item.description: Labatt Breweries of Canada has long been a leader in environmental sustainability, having conducted its first comprehensive environmental policy review over 50 years ago. The company has been investin...

item.title: Parliament Honours the Legacy of Actress and Cultural Pioneer Cynthia Shange
item.description: South Africa’s Parliament has formally paid tribute to the late Cynthia Shange, recognising her as a trailblazing actress and a powerful cultural figure who helped shape the country’s artistic and soc...
